title: HISports Car Replacement 12V / 24V Cigarette Lighter Plug Extension Cable With Leads Cigar Female Socket Plug Extension Cable For Vehicle Motorcycle Car Tractor (2Pcs)
features: Car Replacement 12V / 24V Cigarette Lighter Plug: Cigarette lighter plug applicable voltage 12-24V. Support 10A high current. 17AWG pure copper Leads . Cable length is about 5.9 inches (15cm)

LED Indicator: Cigar Female Socket Plug features LED indicator, It is convenient to check whether the power is normally energized when using, let you easy to check the connection status and allow quick and easy usage in the dark or at night
Easy to installation: 2-pin connector which can easy to connect to UHF / VHF Mobile Radio, another one is cigarette lighter adapter with leads

Widely Used: Cigarette lighter plug can be widely used in various DC12V / 24V equipment such as automobiles and ships. Such as: car blankets, cushions, electric kettle, car cleaners, DVD Player Car Truck Bus Camera Car DVR and more. The output voltage is the same with your devices

Good after sales service: As a reliable brand, HISports strives to provide its customers with perfect products and a pleasant shopping experience. Your satisfaction is our greatest pursuit. If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact HISports and we will contact you as soon as possible. Please rest assured that you are buying it. Thank you
